text:
Fullmetal VS Flame is the 13th episode of the Fullmetal Alchemist 2003 anime series.

Synopsis

Just in time for his annual Assessment, Ed challenges Mustang to a fight. If Ed wins, Roy must tell the truth about the traveling doctor who saved children in Xenotime.

Episode Notes

This episode is adapted from the material of the manga bonus chapters Dog of the Military? and The Military Festival.
This is the last episode of the first season.
It is important to note that the scene where Ed suspiciously glares at the Führer's secretary, Juliet Douglas, foreshadows the later events of the 2003 anime. Additionally, it is utter proof enough that the staff of the 2003 anime were pretty much building up an original story all around from the very beginning while adapting what was already available from the manga at the time, therefore, implying that they most likely knew they were going to overtake the manga anyway.
When Hawkeye shoots a circle of bullet holes around Black Hayate as punishment for peeing on the floor, six bullets are heard being fired, but there are seven holes in the wall.
